title: DualHorse
description: A simple plugin for multiplayer horses.
body:
![Banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31233fb009df8d327aebafbf2f9e120a98010e14_0.webp)
# DualHorse
A simple plugin for multiplayer horses! Have you ever wanted to share a horse with your friend? It is now possible! Just right-click on their horse to join them.

You can access your inventory and use your weapons/tools while your friend is riding.

You can even join them on their donkey and mule, if you so desire!


# Permissions
There are currently no permissions tied to DualHorse.


# Configuration
The config file allows you to choose if DualHorse should work on horses, donkeys and/or mules. You can also choose to disallow two riders when a horse wears armor. It's all customizable!


# Dependencies
There are no dependencies for this plugin. Just place it in your plugin folder and it will work!

# Support
Feel free to join my discord for any questions/problems/suggestions:
https://discord.gg/aP6czXzxhc
